name: TEP-WB
description: The Gaia DR3 catalog of over one million wide binaries opens a precise window onto gravity in the weak-field regime (a < 10^-10 m/s^2). This analysis identifies a screening transition at R_s = 2,461 +/- 178 AU (statistical; +/- 638 AU total), with the velocity profile saturating 35-40% above Newtonian at large separations (alpha_sat = 0.380 +/- 0.012). The signal shows environmental ordering required by TEP, with lower-density populations transitioning at smaller radii than higher-density systems.
